items.title: skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.description_zh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

items.title: GitNexus
items.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
items.description_zh: GitNexus：零服务器代码智能引擎 - GitNexus 是一个完全在浏览器中运行的客户端知识图创建器。放入 GitHub 存储库或 ZIP 文件，即可获得带有内置 Graph RAG 代理的交互式知识图。非常适合代码探索

items.title: awesome-codex-skills
items.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.
items.description_zh: 用于跨 Codex CLI 和 API 实现工作流程自动化的实用 Codex 技能精选列表。

items.title: VibeVoice
items.description_zh: 开源前沿语音人工智能

items.title: claude-code-templates
items.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code
items.description_zh: 用于配置和监控 Claude Code 的 CLI 工具

items.title: GhostTrack
items.description: Useful tool to track location or mobile number
items.description_zh: 跟踪位置或手机号码的有用工具

items.title: ace-step-ui
items.description: 🎵 The Ultimate Open Source Suno Alternative - Professional UI for ACE-Step 1.5 AI Music Generation. Free, local, unlimited. Stop paying for Suno!
items.description_zh: 🎵 终极开源 Suno 替代品 - ACE-Step 1.5 AI 音乐生成的专业 UI。免费、本地、无限制。别再为苏诺付钱了！

items.title: public-apis
items.description: A collective list of free APIs
items.description_zh: 免费 API 集合列表

items.title: ds2api
items.description: Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.
items.description_zh: Deepseek to API：一种轻量级、高性能的全栈中间件，可将客户端协议转换为通用 API。支持多账户轮换、编译二进制文件、Vercel Serverless 和 Docker。兼容 Google、Claude 和 OpenAI API 格式。

items.title: free-claude-code
items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
items.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展中或通过 openclaw 等 Discord 免费使用 claude-code

items.title: system-design-primer
items.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.
items.description_zh: 了解如何设计大型系统。准备系统设计面试。包括 Anki 抽认卡。

items.title: quarkdown
items.description: 🪐 Markdown with superpowers: from ideas to papers, presentations, websites, books, and knowledge bases.
items.description_zh: 🪐 具有超能力的 Markdown：从想法到论文、演示文稿、网站、书籍和知识库。
